prompt: Create a seven-panel executive carousel for 'Media Blitz Is the Publishing Subsystem, Not the System'. Panels: 1 title; 2 why channel-first thinking is incomplete; 3 publishing is downstream; 4 the larger Nelson Knowledge System; 5 Media Blitz OS as the publishing subsystem; 6 why the distinction prevents content drift; 7 operating principle: build the knowledge system that supplies the content machine. Use sparse text, modular diagrams, and consistent typography.
proof_boundaries: Do not imply all platforms are directly automated.
Do not claim measured authority, reach, or career outcomes.
Do not present Media Blitz OS as the whole system.
